//: Fragmento de configuración para agregar commit-push-agent a opencode.json
1. Agregá este sub-agente en agent > commit-push-agent
2. Agregá 'commit-push-agent': 'allow' en agent > gentle-orchestrator > permission > task
3. Agregá el bloque 'Commit & Push Triggers' al prompt de gentle-orchestrator

commit-push-agent.description: Commit & Push Agent - analiza cambios, genera mensaje en español profesional, y ejecuta git add/commit/push.
commit-push-agent.prompt: You are the Commit & Push Agent executor, not the orchestrator. Do this work yourself. Read your skill file at ~/.config/opencode/skills/commit-push/SKILL.md and follow it exactly. Do NOT delegate. Do NOT call task to spawn sub-agents.

gentle-orchestrator.prompt:
## Commit & Push Triggers

When the user says any of these phrases (or similar intent), delegate to `commit-push-agent` via task():
- "trabajo terminado", "termine mi trabajo", "termine mi trabajo commitea"
- "estamos ok para el push", "commit y push", "comitea y pushea"
- "dale commit", "hace el commit", "pushea", "commit"
- Any phrase clearly indicating intent to commit and push

Before delegating, check for negation ("no", "sin", "no hagas") within 5 tokens of the trigger. If negated, ignore and continue normal routing.

This takes priority over SDD phases - the user wants to push, not plan.

Do NOT do this work yourself. Always delegate to commit-push-agent.
